zh.lifeSummary: 當Ann Rushall於大約1579年7月16日出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾巴德比時，她的父親Henry Rushall29歲，母親Winifred Balle30歲。她於1600年7月27日與John Root I在英國諾薩普頓史爾巴德比結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1614年7月之後在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾巴德比，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾巴德比。

zh-hans.Badby, Northamptonshire, England: 英国諾薩普頓史爾巴德比
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ann Rushall于大约1579年7月16日出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾巴德比时，她的父亲Henry Rushall29岁，母亲Winifred Balle30岁。她于1600年7月27日与John Root I在英国諾薩普頓史爾巴德比结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1614年7月之后在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾巴德比，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾巴德比。

nameMeanings.name: Ann

meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Ann Rushall was born about 16 July 1579, in Badby, Northamptonshire, England, her father, Henry Rushall, was 29 and her mother, Winifred Balle, was 30. She married John Root I on 27 July 1600, in Badby, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died after July 1614, in Badby, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Badby, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ann Rushall est née environ 16 juillet 1579, à Badby, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry Rushall, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Winifred Balle, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé John Root I le 27 juillet 1600, à Badby, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée après juillet 1614, à Badby, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Badby, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ann Rushall um 16. Juli 1579 in Badby, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Rushall 29 und ihre Mutter Winifred Balle 30. Sie hat am 27. Juli 1600 in Badby, Northamptonshire, England John Root I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach Juli 1614 in Badby, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Badby, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ann Rushall è nata il circa 16 luglio 1579 nel Badby, Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, Henry Rushall, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Winifred Balle, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato John Root I il 27 luglio 1600, nel Badby, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il luglio 1614, nel Badby, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Badby, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.Church of Saint Virgin Mary, Northamtons: イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアバドビー

ja.Badby, Northamptonshire, England: イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアバドビー
ja.lifeSummary: Ann Rushallが約1579年7月16日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアバドビーで生まれた時，父Henry Rushallは29歳，母Winifred Balleは30歳であった。1600年7月27日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアバドビーでJohn Root Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1614年7月以後にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアバドビーで死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアバドビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ann Rushall(이)가 대략 1579년 7월 16일 영국 노르섬프토실르 바드비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Rushall(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Winifred Balle(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1600년 7월 27일 영국 노르섬프토실르 바드비에서 John Root I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1614년 7월 이후 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 바드비에서 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 바드비에 묻혔다.

pt.about 16 July 1579–after July 1614: aproximadamente 16 de julho de 1579–após julho de 1614
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ann Rushall nasceu aproximadamente 16 de julho de 1579, em Badby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Rushall, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Winifred Balle, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com John Root I em 27 de julho de 1600, em Badby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu após julho de 1614, em Badby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Badby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ann Rushall родилась около 16 июля 1579 г. в местности бадби, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry Rushall было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Winifred Balle, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Root I 27 июля 1600 г. в местности бадби, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла после июля 1614 г. в местности бадби, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности бадби, нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.about 16 July 1579–after July 1614: aproximadamente 16 de julio de 1579–después de julio de 1614
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ann Rushall nació aproximadamente 16 de julio de 1579, en Badby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Rushall, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Winifred Balle, tenía 30 años. Se casó con John Root I el 27 de julio de 1600, en Badby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de julio de 1614, en Badby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Badby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
